awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of CTF frameworks, libraries, resources and softwares
awesomeList.description: A curated list of CTF frameworks, libraries, resources and softwares

nodes.itemHTML: • Kali Linux CTF Blueprints - Online book on building, testing, and customizing your own Capture the Flag challenges.
• IppSec - Video tutorials and walkthroughs of popular CTF platforms.
• Intro. to CTF Course - A free course that teaches beginners the basics of forensics, crypto, and web-ex.
• MotherFucking-CTFstars38 - Badass lightweight plaform to host CTFs. No JS involved.
• Awesome CTF Cheatsheetstars253 - CTF Cheatsheet.
• StegOnline - Conduct a wide range of image steganography operations, such as concealing/revealing files hidden within bits (open-source).
• Turbo Intruder - Burp Suite extension for sending large numbers of HTTP requests
• Hacker101 - CTF from HackerOne
• echoCTF.REDstars15 - Develop, deploy and maintain your own CTF infrastructure.
• echoCTF.RED - Online CTF with a variety of targets to attack.
• CryptoHack - Fun cryptography challenges.
• Kroll Artifact Parser and Extractor (KAPE) - Triage program.
• Magnet AXIOM - Artifact-centric DFIR tool.
• Monit - A linux tool to check a host on the network (and other non-network activities).
• Pwndbgstars3.6k - A GDB plugin that provides a suite of utilities to hack around GDB easily.
• BurpSuite - A graphical tool to testing website security.
• Wireshark - Used to analyze pcap or pcapng files
• SteganographyOnline - Online steganography encoder and decoder.
• PicoCTF - All year round ctf game. Questions from the yearly picoCTF competition.
• QuipQuip - An online tool for breaking substitution ciphers or vigenere ciphers (without key).
• CTF Cheatsheet - CTF tips and tricks.
• Boomerangstars272 - Decompile x86/SPARC/PowerPC/ST-20 binaries to C.
• Snow - A Whitespace Steganography Tool.
• HackThisSitestars159 - CTF write-ups repo maintained by HackThisSite team.
• PentesterLab - Variety of VM and online challenges (paid).
• SANS HHC - Challenges with a holiday theme released annually and maintained by SANS.

• Pngcheck - Verifies the integrity of PNG and dump all of the chunk-level information in human-readable form.
    • apt-get install pngcheck
• Hydra - A parallelized login cracker which supports numerous protocols to attack
• Image Steganography - Embeds text and files in images with optional encryption. Easy-to-use UI.
• Image Steganography Online - This is a client-side Javascript tool to steganographically hide images inside the lower "bits" of other images
• 0e85dc6eafstars73 - Write-ups for CTF challenges by 0e85dc6eaf
• Mzfrstars101 - CTF competition write-ups by mzfr
• SababaSecstars8 - A collection of CTF write-ups by the SababaSec team
• AperiSolve - Aperi'Solve is a platform which performs layer analysis on image (open-source).
• PWN Challenge - Binary Exploitation Wargame.
• CyberChef - Web app for analysing and decoding data.
• PINCEstars1k - GDB front-end/reverse engineering tool, focused on game-hacking and automation.
• Dnscat2stars2.3k - Hosts communication through DNS.
• Registry Dumper - Dump your registry.
• CTFdstars3.4k - Platform to host jeopardy style CTFs from ISISLab, NYU Tandon.
• FBCTFstars6.4k - Platform to host Capture the Flag competitions from Facebook.
• Haaukinsstars114- A Highly Accessible and Automated Virtualization Platform for Security Education.
• HackTheArchstars52 - CTF scoring platform.
• Mellivorastars368 - A CTF engine written in PHP.
• NightShadestars97 - A simple security CTF framework.
• OpenCTFstars76 - CTF in a box. Minimal setup required.
• PyChallFactorystars72 - Small framework to create/manage/package jeopardy CTF challenges.
• RootTheBoxstars538 - A Game of Hackers (CTF Scoreboard & Game Manager).
• Scorebotstars46 - Platform for CTFs by Legitbs (Defcon).
• SecGenstars2.1k - Security Scenario Generator. Creates randomly vulnerable virtual machines.
• Yersiniastars416 - Attack various protocols on layer 2.
• FeatherDusterstars885 - An automated, modular cryptanalysis tool.
• Hash Extenderstars722 - A utility tool for performing hash length extension attacks.
• padding-oracle-attackerstars140 - A CLI tool to execute padding oracle attacks.
• PkCrack - A tool for Breaking PkZip-encryption.
• RSACTFToolstars2.3k - A tool for recovering RSA private key with various attack.
• RSAToolstars498 - Generate private key with knowledge of p and q.
• XORToolstars1k - A tool to analyze multi-byte xor cipher.
• John The Jumbostars4.9k - Community enhanced version of John the Ripper.
• John The Ripper - Password Cracker.
• DLLInjectorstars415 - Inject dlls in processes.

• Metasploit - Penetration testing software.
    • Cheatsheet

• one_gadgetstars1.3k - A tool to find the one gadget execve('/bin/sh', NULL, NULL) call.
    • gem install one_gadget
• Pwntoolsstars7.9k - CTF Framework for writing exploits.
• Qirastars3.2k - QEMU Interactive Runtime Analyser.
• ROP Gadgetstars2.7k - Framework for ROP exploitation.
• V0ltstars343 - Security CTF Toolkit.

• Aircrack-Ng - Crack 802.11 WEP and WPA-PSK keys.
    • apt-get install aircrack-ng

• Audacity - Analyze sound files (mp3, m4a, whatever).
    • apt-get install audacity

• Bkhive and Samdump2 - Dump SYSTEM and SAM files.
    • apt-get install samdump2 bkhive
• CFF Explorer - PE Editor.
• Creddumpstars188 - Dump windows credentials.
• DVCS Ripperstars1.3k - Rips web accessible (distributed) version control systems.
• Exif Tool - Read, write and edit file metadata.
• Extundelete - Used for recovering lost data from mountable images.
• Fibratusstars1.2k - Tool for exploration and tracing of the Windows kernel.

• Foremost - Extract particular kind of files using headers.
    • apt-get install foremost
• Fsck.ext4 - Used to fix corrupt filesystems.
• Malzilla - Malware hunting tool.
• NetworkMiner - Network Forensic Analysis Tool.
• PDF Streams Inflater - Find and extract zlib files compressed in PDF files.
• ResourcesExtract - Extract various filetypes from exes.
• Shellbagsstars124 - Investigate NT_USER.dat files.
• USBRipstars930 - Simple CLI forensics tool for tracking USB device artifacts (history of USB events) on GNU/Linux.
• Volatilitystars4.5k - To investigate memory dumps.
• Androguardstars3.5k - Reverse engineer Android applications.
• Angrstars5.1k - platform-agnostic binary analysis framework.
• Apk2Goldstars590 - Yet another Android decompiler.
• ApkTool - Android Decompiler.
• Barfstars1.3k - Binary Analysis and Reverse engineering Framework.
• Binary Ninja - Binary analysis framework.
• BinUtils - Collection of binary tools.
• ctf_importstars98 – run basic functions from stripped binaries cross platform.
• cwe_checkerstars401 - cwe_checker finds vulnerable patterns in binary executables.
• demovfuscatorstars544 - A work-in-progress deobfuscator for movfuscated binaries.
• Frida - Dynamic Code Injection.
• GDB - The GNU project debugger.
• GEFstars3.6k - GDB plugin.
• Hopper - Reverse engineering tool (disassembler) for OSX and Linux.
• IDA Pro - Most used Reversing software.
• Jadxstars25.9k - Decompile Android files.
• Java Decompilers - An online decompiler for Java and Android APKs.
• Krakataustars1.4k - Java decompiler and disassembler.
• Objectionstars3.7k - Runtime Mobile Exploration.
• PEDAstars4.6k - GDB plugin (only python2.7).
• Pin - A dynamic binary instrumentaion tool by Intel.
• PinCTFstars403 - A tool which uses intel pin for Side Channel Analysis.
• radare2stars14.4k - A portable reversing framework.
• Tritonstars1.8k - Dynamic Binary Analysis (DBA) framework.
• Uncompylestars398 - Decompile Python 2.7 binaries (.pyc).
• WinDbg - Windows debugger distributed by Microsoft.
• Xocopy - Program that can copy executables with execute, but no read permission.
• Z3stars6.4k - A theorem prover from Microsoft Research.
• CSWSH - Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking Tester.
• Request Bin - Lets you inspect http requests to a particular url.
• Convert - Convert images b/w formats and apply filters.
• Exif - Shows EXIF information in JPEG files.
• Exiftool - Read and write meta information in files.
• Exiv2 - Image metadata manipulation tool.
• ImageMagick - Tool for manipulating images.
• Outguess - Universal steganographic tool.

• Pngtools - For various analysis related to PNGs.
    • apt-get install pngtools
• SmartDeblurstars2.1k - Used to deblur and fix defocused images.
• Steganabara - Tool for stegano analysis written in Java.
• Stegbreak - Launches brute-force dictionary attacks on JPG image.
• StegCrackerstars401 - Steganography brute-force utility to uncover hidden data inside files.
• stegextractstars79 - Detect hidden files and text in images.
• Steghide - Hide data in various kind of images.
• Stegsolve - Apply various steganography techniques to images.
• Zstegstars690 - PNG/BMP analysis.
• Hackbar - Firefox addon for easy web exploitation.
• Postman - Add on for chrome for debugging network requests.
• Raccoonstars2.1k - A high performance offensive security tool for reconnaissance and vulnerability scanning.
• SQLMapstars20k - Automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool. pip install sqlmap
• XSSer - Automated XSS testor.
• Android Tamer - Based on Debian.
• BackBox - Based on Ubuntu.
• BlackArch Linux - Based on Arch Linux.
• Fedora Security Lab - Based on Fedora.
• Kali Linux - Based on Debian.
• Parrot Security OS - Based on Debian.
• Pentoo - Based on Gentoo.
• URIX OS - Based on openSUSE.
• Wifislax - Based on Slackware.
• CTF Field Guide - Field Guide by Trails of Bits.
• CTF Resources - Start Guide maintained by community.
• LiveOverFlow - Video tutorials on Exploitation.
• MIPT CTFstars226 - A small course for beginners in CTFs (in Russian).
• Crackmes - Reverse Engineering Challenges.
• Microcorruption - Embedded security CTF.
• Over The Wire - Wargame maintained by OvertheWire Community.
• Pwnable.kr - Pwn Game.
• Pwnable.tw - Binary wargame.
• Pwnable.xyz - Binary Exploitation Wargame.
• Reversin.kr - Reversing challenge.
• Ringzer0Team - Ringzer0 Team Online CTF.
• ROP Wargamesstars14 - ROP Wargames.
• CTF Time - General information on CTF occuring around the worlds.
• Reddit Security CTF - Reddit CTF category.
• Bamboofox - Chinese resources to learn CTF.
• bi0s Wiki - Wiki from team bi0s.
• ISIS Lab - CTF Wiki by Isis lab.
• OpenToAllstars107 - CTF tips by OTA CTF team members.
• Captf - Dumped CTF challenges and materials by psifertex.
• CTF write-ups (community) - CTF challenges + write-ups archive maintained by the community.
• CTFTime Scrapperstars24 - Scraps all writeup from CTF Time and organize which to read first.
• pwntools writeupsstars418 - A collection of CTF write-ups all using pwntools.
• Shell Storm - CTF challenge archive maintained by Jonathan Salwan.
• PicoCTFstars223 - The platform used to run picoCTF. A great framework to host any CTF.
• Uglifystars11.4k
• Zeek - An open-source network security monitor.
• Exploit Exercises - Variety of VMs to learn variety of computer security issues.
• Exploit.Education - Variety of VMs to learn variety of computer security issues.
• Grackerstars4 - Binary challenges having a slow learning curve, and write-ups for each level.
• Viblo CTF - Various amazing CTF challenges, in many different categories. Has both Practice mode and Contest mode.
• Ghidra - Open Source suite of reverse engineering tools. Similar to IDA Pro.
• Metasploit JavaScript Obfuscator
• Hacking-Lab - Ethical hacking, computer network and security challenge platform.
• Hone Your Ninja Skills - Web challenges starting from basic ones.
• Bettercapstars9.8k - Framework to perform MITM (Man in the Middle) attacks.
• Root-Me - Hacking and Information Security learning platform.
• Nmap - An open source utility for network discovery and security auditing.
• Zmap - An open-source network scanner.
• Masscanstars15.3k - Mass IP port scanner, TCP port scanner.

• Wireshark - Analyze the network dumps.
    • apt-get install wireshark
• W3Challs - A penetration testing training platform, which offers various computer challenges, in various categories.
• Hack The Box - Weekly CTFs for all types of security enthusiasts.
• Nozzlrstars53 - Nozzlr is a bruteforce framework, trully modular and script-friendly.
• Patatorstars2.5k - Patator is a multi-purpose brute-forcer, with a modular design.
• libformatstrstars324 - Simplify format string exploitation.
• Hashcat - Password Cracker
• OWASP ZAP - Intercepting proxy to replay, debug, and fuzz HTTP requests and responses
• Nipestars1.1k - Nipe is a script to make Tor Network your default gateway.
• Plasmastars2.9k - An interactive disassembler for x86/ARM/MIPS which can generate indented pseudo-code with colored syntax.
• Commixstars2.7k - Automated All-in-One OS Command Injection and Exploitation Tool.
• LazyKalistars33 - A 2016 refresh of LazyKali which simplifies install of tools and configuration.
• W3afstars3.6k - Web Application Attack and Audit Framework.
• IO - Wargame for binary challenges.
• WebHacking - Hacking challenges for web.
• SmashTheStack - A variety of wargames maintained by the SmashTheStack Community.
• Backdoor - Security Platform by SDSLabs.
• CTF Toolsstars5.6k - Collection of setup scripts to install various security research tools.
• VulnHub - VM-based for practical in digital security, computer application & network administration.
• How to Get Started in CTF - Short guideline for CTF beginners by Endgame
• Smoke Leet Everydaystars180 - CTF write-ups repo maintained by SmokeLeetEveryday team.
• Hack This Site - Training ground for hackers.
• Ophcrack - Windows password cracker based on rainbow tables.
• BinWalkstars7.3k - Analyze, reverse engineer, and extract firmware images.
